🟧 ORANGE BARRIERS — dodge left or right to avoid
🔴 RED SIGNALS — dodge into a clear lane
🛉 STATIONS — brake with ↓ then SPACE to stop in the green zone
🔀 JUNCTIONS — choose a track before the timer runs out
📍 Reach the end of the line to win!
